canonical_definition: Generating claims that reflect the ideological stance and rhetorical style of a specified persona (e.g., Democrat, Republican, Moderate) by conditioning the model on role descriptions.
papers: Personalization up to a Point: Why Personalized Content Moderation Needs Boundaries, and How We Can Enforce Them
